metadata.description: NWMP (National Water Monitoring Programme) monitoring stations for Raipur, Chhattisgarh with precise geographic coordinates.

stations.name: River Mahanadi at Rajim
stations.notes: Downstream station; confluence of Mahanadi, Pairi and Sondur rivers at Rajim

stations.name: River Mahanadi at Ruddri Dam
stations.location_description: Upstream of Dhamtari Reservoir (U/S Dhamtari Reservoir)
stations.notes: Located upstream of Gangrel (Dhamtari) Dam / Ruddri Barrage

stations.name: River Kharoon at Bhatagaon
stations.notes: Water supply intake point for Raipur city; key drinking water source

stations.name: River Sheonath at Simga
stations.notes: Tributary of Mahanadi; monitors industrial discharge influence from Durg/Raipur corridor

stations.name: River Mahanadi at Arang
stations.notes: Located at Gandhi Bridge near Arang town on NH-30

stations.name: River Mahanadi at Sihava
stations.location_description: Origin Point of Mahanadi, Sihava hills
stations.notes: Origin/source point of River Mahanadi in Sihava (Nagri) hills; upstream reference station

stations.name: River Kharoon at Bendri Village
stations.location_description: Near Water Supply Intakewell, Bendri Village
stations.notes: Downstream of Siltara industrial area; secondary water supply intake for Raipur
